sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal; prob. to deny, to refuse; Arab. نَهْنَهَ and نها to prohibit, to forbid (compare as to verbs of negation p. 21, A ). Hence-

Hithpalpel הִתְמַהְמַהּ to delay, to linger (pr. to refuse, to turn back), Gen 19:16 43:10 Exo 12:39 Jud. 3:26 19:8 2Sa 15:28 Isa 29:9 Hab 2:3.
